summary: Complete testing of Gates section refactoring: Login flow working, Gates Dashboard showing all KPIs, Gate Map Management with full CRUD (Add/Edit/Delete floors), Daily Gate Sessions page loading correctly. All pages have proper data-testid attributes. Prayer Areas pages (map-management, daily-sessions) verified as working for regression. Backend API tests: 17/17 passed including the newly added PUT /api/admin/gate-map/floors/{floor_id} endpoint.

login_flow.login_page_loads: PASS - Login page renders with email/password fields

gate_map_management.floor_cards: PASS - Floor cards display with data-testid='floor-card-{id}'
gate_map_management.add_floor_functionality: PASS - Dialog opens, floor created successfully
gate_map_management.edit_floor_functionality: PASS - Edit dialog opens with current data, changes persist
gate_map_management.delete_floor_functionality: PASS - Confirmation dialog, floor deleted successfully

regression_prayer_areas.map_management_page: PASS - /map-management loads with 2 floors (Basement, Ground Floor)

backend_api_tests.gate_session_create: PASS - POST /api/admin/gate-sessions creates session with cloned gates
backend_api_tests.session_complete: PASS - Session status update to completed working

critical_code_review_comments: All Gates section pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Gate Map CRUD operations (Add/Edit/Delete) fully functional
Daily Gate Sessions page matches Prayer Areas Daily Sessions UI/UX pattern
17/17 backend tests passed for gate sessions and floor CRUD
seed_data_creation: Test floor created and deleted during CRUD testing. Original floor name restored after edit test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 tested the complete Gates section refactoring. Routes: /gates (Dashboard), /gate-map (Floor CRUD), /daily-gates (Sessions). Data-testids: gates-page, gates-kpi-row, gates-total, gates-open, gates-closed, gate-map-page, page-title, add-gate-floor-btn, refresh-btn, floor-card-{id}, floor-edit-{id}, floor-delete-{id}, gate-floor-name-ar, gate-floor-name-en, daily-gate-sessions-page, floor-select, start-new-tour-btn, batch-entry-btn, monthly-calendar, session-card-{id}. Prayer Areas pages verified working for regression.
